cells.rationale: New-pattern FFI flock/probe primitives with subtle concurrency correctness (sync deadline acquire that must never block forever, FD_CLOEXEC across git spawns, platform-specific constants) that the whole epic composes on.

Cross-cutting lock-ordering and release-discipline correctness invariant (deadlock-safe outer/inner order, no leak across in-process runCaptured, EAFP under stale probe) wired through every mutating verb plus a new commit-time envelope class.
Correctness-critical data-destruction rollback (the incident class itself) generalized across verbs from a named done.ts precedent, where a wrong restore reopens the staged-file destruction window.

Novel durable-by-construction id-ledger design (append-only JSONL, crash-truncated-tail tolerance, injection safety, max(scan,ledger)+1 across three mint sites) with subtle correctness under unlocked degrade — the epic's spine.

Distress-row/producer-probe invariants (no fold, level-triggered, re-fold determinism sacred) plus a resolver-contract change that ripples through callers, mirroring named templates but correctness-sensitive.

Additive defer arm inside the invariant-dense recover-pass ladder where a wrong touch collapses distinct deferral reasons or breaks positive-evidence-only level-clear, plus worker-facing skill/brief contract prose.
